tagged_types.name: String_Input
tagged_types.code: type String_Input is new Input_Source with private;

documentation.description:
A special implementation of a reader, that reads from a unicode
byte sequence.

access_types.name: String_Input_Access
access_types.code: type String_Input_Access is access all String_Input'Class;

documentation.description:
A special implementation of a reader, that reads from a unicode
byte sequence.
Free the memory occupied by Input
True if From is past the last character in the string.

subprograms.name: Next_Char

documentation.description: Return the next character in the string.

subprograms.name: Open

documentation.description:
Creates a new reader that reads from a byte-sequence, encoded with a
specific encoding.
No copy of Str is kept, we simply keep the pointer.
